conflict: The impossibility of returning to normal life with a dead paladin narrating everything
consequence: From shock to uneasy coexistence; Aldric's grief surfaces beneath his sarcasm, complicating the comedy
must_land_beats: Maren's daily fraud routine revealed — the social performance, the cues from others' reactions to System prompts, the small village kindnesses toward the 'blind man'
Aldric's real-time interface reading — the scope of what Maren has been missing for twenty-eight years
Aldric's grief breaking through: he's dead, he had a life, he is trapped
pressure_source: The impossibility of returning to normal life with a dead paladin narrating everything
secondary_character_beats: Aldric's grief must register as genuine anguish, not just setup for comedy. He had an order, duties, people who loved him. A moment where the sarcasm drops and Maren doesn't know how to respond.

setups_to_plant.description: Aldric notes something odd about how Maren's consciousness interacts with the System — a quality of absence that doesn't match ordinary blindness
Aldric is oddly specific about certain System details, suggesting pre-existing knowledge of what to look for in Maren's profile

state_shift: From shock to uneasy coexistence; Aldric's grief surfaces beneath his sarcasm, complicating the comedy
